description.overview: The Komondor's distinctive corded coat helped it blend in with sheep and protected it from predators and weather.
description.temperament: Komondorok are calm, dignified guardians. Protective and loyal but independent.
description.health: Prone to hip dysplasia and bloat. Coat requires special care.
description.exercise: Moderate exercise needs. Need space to guard and patrol.

verdict.summary: The iconic corded Hungarian guardian. Komondorok are loyal protectors but their unique coat requires dedicated care.
